caption: A man with a tall, grey, sculpted wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders. He wears large black headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. In the background, walls are decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. To the left and right of the man, red and white logos are visible on the screen, featuring the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" alongside a microphone icon. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains his position and continues speaking, with slight movements of his head and facial expressions. The setting and equipment remain static throughout the frames, focusing on the man as he engages in a podcast-style conversation.
